requirements.requirement: 实现并验证“项目定位：AI-assisted design-to-development automation workspace”：merge structured design authoring, DevFlow stage orchestration, artifact validation, and UCOS memory into one movable project.
requirements.acceptance: 可通过配置、运行流程或人工检查证明“项目定位：AI-assisted design-to-development automation workspace”已按来源实现。

requirements.requirement: 实现并验证“平台：Windows desktop application with Python CLI pipeline support”：run the GUI design tool and command-line development stages from the same project root.
requirements.acceptance: 可通过配置、运行流程或人工检查证明“平台：Windows desktop application with Python CLI pipeline support”已按来源实现。

requirements.requirement: 实现并验证“目标玩家：game designers, technical designers, and Unity developers”：support repeated design decisions, validation, handoff, and implementation review.
requirements.acceptance: 可通过配置、运行流程或人工检查证明“目标玩家：game designers, technical designers, and Unity developers”已按来源实现。

requirements.requirement: 实现并验证“商业模式：internal production tool and reusable automation framework”：prioritize correctness, traceability, migration safety, and local execution over marketing presentation.
requirements.acceptance: 可通过配置、运行流程或人工检查证明“商业模式：internal production tool and reusable automation framework”已按来源实现。

requirements.requirement: 实现并验证“核心循环：load design knowledge -> choose structured decisions -> export Concept package -> run DevFlow stages -> review artifacts”：make each design-to-development handoff explicit and testable.
requirements.acceptance: 可通过配置、运行流程或人工检查证明“核心循环：load design knowledge -> choose structured decisions -> export Concept package -> run DevFlow stages -> review artifacts”已按来源实现。

requirements.requirement: 实现并验证“压力来源：manual handoff drift, stale absolute paths, missing source packages, and unverifiable development outputs”：turn migration risks into validation checks before actual Unity project mutation.
requirements.acceptance: 可通过配置、运行流程或人工检查证明“压力来源：manual handoff drift, stale absolute paths, missing source packages, and unverifiable development outputs”已按来源实现。

requirements.requirement: 实现并验证“奖励节奏：immediate stage summaries, validation reports, package manifests, and build artifacts”：give operators fast feedback after every design or development stage.
requirements.acceptance: 可通过配置、运行流程或人工检查证明“奖励节奏：immediate stage summaries, validation reports, package manifests, and build artifacts”已按来源实现。

requirements.requirement: 实现并验证“system_layer：DevFlow Orchestrator”：execute stages 00-15 with preflight, artifact generation, validation, and review gates.

requirements.requirement: 实现并验证“内容：design domains, entity schemas, project templates, prompt frameworks, saved projects, source packages, and exported reports”：keep authoring content and runtime artifacts separated while preserving legacy data.
